name: chart/bubble-chart
description: Bubble chart mapping x, y, and size dimensions; radius is area-proportional via sqrt scale.

meta.name: BubbleChart
meta.description: Bubble chart mapping x, y, and size dimensions; radius is area-proportional via sqrt scale.

props.name: series
props.type: { name: string; data: { x: number; y: number; size: number }[] }[]

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

props.name: glyph
props.description: Point glyph shape (circle/square/diamond/triangle/cross/star) — a fixed shape or a function to encode a category by shape.

examples.title: Basic bubble chart
examples.code:
import { BubbleChart } from '@cascivo/charts'

const series = [{ name: 'Group A', data: [{x:1,y:2,size:10},{x:3,y:4,size:30}] }]
<BubbleChart series={series} title="Bubble" />

whenToUse: Plotting three dimensions at once — x, y, and a size-encoded magnitude
Comparing entities where relative scale matters alongside position
whenNotToUse: Showing only a 2D correlation — use ScatterChart
Comparing many small magnitudes where size differences are unreadable

related.name: ScatterChart
related.reason: Use when there is no third size dimension to encode

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
